settings.subtitle: SPF 60+ / Broad Spectrum
settings.description: A lightweight, non-greasy sunscreen that provides high-level protection against UVA/UVB rays while keeping your skin hydrated and glowing.

settings.label: GOOD FOR:
settings.value: All skin types, especially those looking for an invisible finish

settings.label: FEELS LIKE:
settings.value: A weightless lotion that absorbs instantly with zero white cast

settings.label: LOOKS LIKE:
settings.value: Sun-protected skin with a natural, healthy dewy glow

settings.label: FYI:
settings.value: No White Cast • Non-Comedogenic • Fast-Absorbing • SPF 60+

settings.title: A high-protection sunscreen for SAFE + GLOWING skin.
centella asiatica
settings.description: soothes skin and reduces redness caused by sun exposure

settings.title: niacinamide
settings.description: helps brighten skin and improve the appearance of enlarged pores while protecting the barrier

settings.title: what's inside
settings.intro: Advanced UV filters paired with skin-loving botanicals for ultimate protection and care.
settings.footer_text: also made with HYALURONIC ACID, VITAMIN E, PANTHENOL, AND ZINC OXIDE

settings.description: SAID IT LEFT ZERO WHITE CAST ON SKIN
SAID THEIR SKIN FELT HYDRATED THROUGHOUT THE DAY
SAID IT WORKED PERFECTLY UNDER MAKEUP

settings.footnote: Based on a 1-week consumer perception study with daily application.

settings.question: Is it water-resistant?
settings.answer: Yes, it offers moderate water resistance, though we recommend re-applying after swimming.

settings.question: Will it clog my pores?
settings.answer: No, it is non-comedogenic and lightweight, making it safe for acne-prone skin.

settings.question: Can I use it on sensitive skin?
settings.answer: Yes, Centella Asiatica helps soothe and protect sensitive skin types.
